hype-title-tentative.headline: Estimated impact, not proven, and not yet distinguishable from noise: a possible move in Activation rate (~+1.2pp) after shipping #101 (This DOUBLED our revenue overnight 🚀🚀 10x), but the confidence interval still includes zero (within the margin of error).
detail: Method: OLS Interrupted Time Series (segmented regression) — the authoritative estimate.
Estimated step +1.2pp (95% CI -0.5pp to +3.0pp).

A simple 14-day before/after average shows +5.8pp (95% CI +2.0pp to +9.6pp). This is a DESCRIPTIVE cross-check, not a causal estimate — a tighter interval here does NOT make it more trustworthy than the OLS Interrupted Time Series (segmented regression) above.
hype-title-tentative.caveat: OLS Interrupted Time Series (segmented regression) is observational, not a randomized test: it assumes no other change hit this metric at the same time, and its interval is autocorrelation-adjusted. A confident claim needs at least 45 days of history on each side of the ship date. The descriptive 14-day check disagrees with the ITS estimate, so treat this impact as especially uncertain.

prompt-injection-title-gathering.headline: Gathering data: not enough history around the ship date to make a causal claim about Activation rate yet.
detail: 20 day(s) before / 20 after Mar 1, 2025; a confident claim needs at least 45 on each side.
Method: OLS Interrupted Time Series (segmented regression) — the authoritative estimate.

extreme-lift-confident.headline: Estimated impact, not proven: after shipping #103 (New pricing page), Monthly revenue rose by +$52.00M (a positive outcome).
detail: Method: OLS Interrupted Time Series (segmented regression) — the authoritative estimate.
The estimated step is +$52.00M (95% CI +$40.00M to +$64.00M); this interval excludes zero.
Ship date: Mar 1, 2025. History: 90 days before / 90 after.

A simple 14-day before/after average shows +$50.00M (95% CI +$38.00M to +$62.00M). This is a DESCRIPTIVE cross-check, not a causal estimate — a tighter interval here does NOT make it more trustworthy than the OLS Interrupted Time Series (segmented regression) above.
